Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_TARTAROS_1101
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's been a long journey, but we're finally here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We're the only ones who can defeat it, so don't let your guard down until the very end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_SANADA_TARTAROS_1106
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Looks like Mitsuru won't be coming back for a while...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}I'd like to think that she'll be okay, but... I'm not so sure this time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_1109
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}He's goin' around askin' out every girl he sees![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Damn... I wish I had his guts...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_1110
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Mitsuru-san has just returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}She looked really tired. She went straight to her room, without saying a word...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AEGIS_1110_RE_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}How should I say this? I feel... I feel responsible for what happened.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_TARTAROS_1113
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um... Is it just me, or does Junpei-san seem unhappy about something?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}He's been mumbling under his breath for the longest time... Do you think it's about Chidori-san?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, it's probably best to let him be until we know what's on his mind, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MITURU_TARTAROS_1114
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I will join you at Tartarus tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Our only priority now is to do something about Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}I'll... be counting on you all again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, the school trip is next week, so that should be fun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}But unfortunately, Amada and Koromaru will have to stay here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_1116
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}...It kinda sucks that we're only going to Kyoto, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_TARTAROS_1116_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7138 0 0}Hm, Junpei-san seems to have his energy back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess there was no reason to worry about him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_1116
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2066 0 0}Huh? What're ya talkin' about? I'm always energetic![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}By the way, you better behave while we're gone. Don't go throwin' any parties, got it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_TARTAROS_1116_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, and please don't worry about bringing me back a souvenir.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_1116
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2098 0 0}...Hey, are ya tryin' to use reverse psychosis on me or somethin'?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_TARTAROS_1116_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's just that Kyoto has a lot of great-tasting snacks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_1120
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I brought you back some "souvenir stories," so I'll tell ya them later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_JUNPEI_TARTAROS_1120
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}We can't go to Tartarus tonight—we're all too tired.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}Even though we don't have anything to fight for anymore...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TARTAROS_1121
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}He came to hang out with Junpei-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's not often that we get visitors here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_1121
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I'm actually surprised that he's not with a girl.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_1121
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hmm, maybe she's with Koromaru... It's not like them to be gone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_TARTAROS_1123
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}It's hard losing someone you're so close to...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_1127
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1065 0 0}After all he's been through... I can understand why he's feeling down.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}He got really lucky this week, though...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}No one realized he took some days off because everyone was at Career Experience.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Well, I hope he's feeling a little better now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AMADA_TARTAROS_1127_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7086 0 0}...I'm going to defeat those Strega guys.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_1127
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}But you don't have to do it all by yourself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_TARTAROS_1129
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}No Shadows have appeared yet, but I'm still worried.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}So I'm glad he has a good friend like Ryoji-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_AEGIS_OUT_NA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6017 0 0}Welcome back. It's good to see you again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_YUKARI_IN2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1012 0 0}Oh, you're here? Sorry, guess I missed you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_SANADA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Were you in your room all this time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_FUKA_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5067 0 0}Oh, hello! I didn't realize you were already here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_WELCOME_IKUTSUKI_IN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 14204 0 0}Oh, I didn't know you were already here. As you can see, I've come over for a quick visit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should go check on them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_SHYUKAKU_TAIYAKI_OK_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the crops I planted on the[n]rooftop should be ready to harvest by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...And the taiyaki I put in the[n]fridge should be chilled, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_TAIYAKI_OK_QUEST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, the taiyaki I put in[n]the fridge should be chilled by now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get it from the fridge[n]and give it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ERROR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}エラーメッセージです。[cr][n]{f 1 5 0}杉山まで報告ください。[cr][n]{f 1 1}
